recommendation: Pursue after confirming that the VP title carries portfolio investment authority, a product organization, and direct executive sponsorship.
role_brief: The mandate appears to combine product strategy, platform roadmap, team leadership, and commercialization for a regulated digital-health platform.
company_brief: Acceptance-test company used to verify the complete packet workflow.
evidence_match: Lead with AI platform portfolio strategy, building the Hearthline Health product organization, Atlas Cloud platform commercialization, and portfolio business-model innovation.
gaps_risks: The reporting line, budget authority, team size, and approved compensation range remain unknown.
diligence_questions: What decisions does the role own? Which decisions remain with the CEO or engineering? What is the product team's current shape? What must be true in 12 months?
interview_packet: Prepare stories on strategic pivot, product organization building, AI platform deployment, platform launch, and executive alignment.
outreach: I have spent my career building enterprise AI platforms and trusted digital-health products. The mandate described here is closely aligned with the work I want to do next.
cover_letter: I am interested in the opportunity to lead a clinically consequential product portfolio where customer insight, systems strategy, and commercialization must work as one.
resume: Use the approved master resume and prioritize the Atlas Cloud, Hearthline Health, Meridian Marketplace, and Northwind Software evidence.
